title: The Host
tmdbOverview: A teenage girl is captured by a giant mutated squid-like creature that appears from Seoul's Han River after toxic waste was dumped in it, prompting her family into a frantic search for her.
synopsis: Released in 2006, The Host is a horror, drama and science fiction film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
